text.title: Facebook Ads Campaign Management
text.summary: Campaign objectives, CBO budget setup, status lifecycle, and update patterns using Meta Marketing API v20+.

rule.statement: All budget values are in cents: daily_budget of 10000 equals $100.00. Always verify the unit before setting budgets.
rule.rationale: Setting budget in dollars instead of cents causes 100x overspend. This is the most common Meta API mistake.

rule.statement: Always create campaigns with status PAUSED. Activate only after reviewing all ad sets and creatives are correctly configured.
rule.rationale: A campaign set to ACTIVE immediately starts spending. PAUSED allows review without risk.

list.item: DELETED: soft-deleted, still recoverable via API

section.title: Campaign Budget Optimization (CBO)
section.p: With CBO enabled, Meta distributes the campaign-level budget across ad sets automatically based on performance. Use when running multiple ad sets to find the best audience.

rule.statement: Use LOWEST_COST_WITHOUT_CAP for initial campaigns without a known target CPA. Switch to COST_CAP or LOWEST_COST_WITH_MIN_ROAS only after establishing baseline performance.
rule.rationale: Cap-based strategies require accurate cost knowledge to set. Without baseline data, caps that are too low starve the algorithm of learning budget.

text.reference: cURL example for creating a campaign with objective and budget
